title: Sulcorebutia oligacantha
intro: Sulcorebutia oligacantha is a species of flowering plant in the cactus family, characterized by its small, globular stems and intricate spines. The plant is reported to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce stress, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against cell damage. taxonomy: Sulcorebutia oligacantha is classified within the family Cactaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Cactoideae and tribe Rebutieae. This plant is further classified under the genus Sulcorebutia, which is a group of small cacti native to South America. The species S. oligacantha is one of several species within the genus, distinguished by its unique characteristics and physical traits. The classification of S. oligacantha helps in understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other cacti species.
